name: validate_construction_file
description: Validate whether a DNA cloning construction workflow is biologically correct. Supports GoldenGate and Gibson assembly. Checks PCR primer annealing, primer orientation, amplicon validity, and assembly compatibility (overhangs for GoldenGate, overlaps for Gibson).

inputs.name: assembly_strategy
inputs.description: Assembly strategy used. Must be either GoldenGate or Gibson.

inputs.name: backbone_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence or resource name for the backbone plasmid.

inputs.name: insert_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence or resource name for the insert.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert forward primer name. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert forward primer sequence. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer name. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer sequence. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector forward primer name. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector forward primer sequence. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer name. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer sequence. Required unless primers were auto-designed.

inputs.name: enzyme
inputs.description: Restriction enzyme used. Required for GoldenGate only (e.g., BsaI). Not required for Gibson.

inputs.name: min_anneal_len
inputs.description: Minimum required primer annealing length for PCR validation. Default is 12.

inputs.name: strict
inputs.description: If true, stop at first failure. If false, return full report.

outputs.description: Validation results for the construction workflow.

details.description: Step-by-step validation results (PCR insert, PCR vector, assembly).
